title: Gold Number 3 Shaped Large Foil Balloon (86cm) 1 Piece - Perfect for Birthday Parties and Special Events, 34-Inch
features: NUMBER 3 SHAPED: Stand out with this stunning gold number 3-shaped large foil balloon, perfect for celebrating a birthday or commemorating a special milestone. Your event will certainly be remembered as a fabulous affair with this impressive centerpiece.

GORGEOUS GOLD DESIGN: Steal the spotlight with the gold hue of this foil balloon, creating a lively atmosphere in any celebration. This beautiful color adds a touch of charm and elegance to your event, delighting and captivating guests of all ages.

IMPRESSIVE SIZE: Impress your guests with the astonishing 86cm height of this gold number 3 balloon. This giant foil balloon makes a bold statement and serves as a fantastic backdrop for picture-perfect memories of your special day.

ONE-PIECE CONVENIENCE: Cut down on decorations fuss with this 1-piece, easy-to-inflate, large number 3 balloon. Save time and effort with this spectacular, easy-to-setup addition to your party décor that instantly uplifts the venue.

PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION: Ideal for celebrating 3rd birthdays, anniversaries, or enhancing creative theme parties and events, this gold number 3 shaped large foil balloon is a must-have item to create unforgettable moments.
description: From the manufacturer Giant Gold 34" Foil Number Balloons Make no mistake where the celebrations begin with these Giant Gold Foil Number Balloons! These balloons are ideal to show off your birthday age, anniversary year or new year in eye catching fashion and fit any party with a gold motif or accent! Don't forget the balloon weights and ribbon!
